OpenAI rate limits

Learn how rate limits work for responses, tokens, and requests, plus how usage tiers and model choices can affect throughput in production.

Models overview

Compare models, context windows, latency, and capabilities so you can choose the right model for product work, experimentation, and agentic workflows.

Why am I rate limited?

This help article explains common causes of rate limiting, how request spikes affect usage, and what retry strategies are usually recommended for client applications.

Community discussion

Developers discuss bursts, concurrency, dashboards, and how to keep background jobs from colliding with interactive usage during busy periods.
